name: Elegant Almond Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a pre-made pie crust and place it in the prepared tart pan. Generously prick the bottom of the crust with a fork.
2. Trim any excess dough from around the edges of the pan to allow for some shrinkage during baking.
3. Follow the package directions for initial cooking time.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together 1/4 cup sugar, 1/2 cup heavy cream, grated orange peel, almond extract, and sliced almonds until combined.
5. Allow the mixture to stand for 15 minutes before proceeding.
6. Pour the mixture into the cooled pie crust shell.
7. Bake in the middle of the oven at 400°F (200°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Serve with whipped cream if desired. Makes 8-10 servings.
